name: Menaced by Its Own Garbage
text:
At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, that player chooses: lose 2 life, or put a sludge counter on a creature you control. Most days they pay the counter to keep their life. That is exactly how it gets so big.
{2}{R}{G}: Until end of turn, creatures you control with sludge counters can't be blocked by creatures with fewer sludge counters.
flavorText: The town made it. The town fed it. The town gets the bill.

extras.communalKaiju: every opponent feeds it on their upkeep
